message:
fix: handle virtual tables (rootpage=0) gracefully instead of crashing

Virtual tables in sqlite_master have rootpage=0. The schema loader
was treating these as regular B-tree tables, causing the planner to
emit OpenRead on page 0 which crashed. Now detects virtual tables
and returns an appropriate error instead of panicking.

Closes #15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
